name: Panoptive
long_description:
We turn unstructured monitoring data - monitoring visit reports, EDC data - into structured deviation, safety, and quality findings for human review. Panoptive generates an audit-ready oversight trail as a natural byproduct. 

The platform aggregates findings and identifies systemic patterns across sites and subjects before they compound, and tracks every finding through decision, follow-up, and resolution.
one_liner: The oversight engine for clinical trials
